**Analyzing strike notice**

I need to assess the HTML content to determine if it announces an upcoming strike. The title indicates a two-hour strike on Wednesday, July 23, 2025. The page includes the notice about the strike, stating that the union has declared a two-hour strike from 09:00 to 11:00, citing workplace safety as the reason. It also mentions last departures before the strike and first departures after, confirming this is indeed a future strike announcement.
